sourceUrl.description: URL of the VMware vCenter server (e.g. `https://vcenter.example.com/sdk`).

sourceSecretName.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret containing VMware credentials (`user`, `password`, `thumbprint` keys).

vddkInitImage.description: VDDK init image (VMware Virtual Disk Development Kit) used by Forklift for efficient vSphere disk transfer. Required when `skipGuestConversion` is enabled (raw-copy mode). Built from the proprietary VMware VDDK SDK and pushed to a registry reachable by the cluster. Note: VDDK connects directly to the ESXi hosts, so the cluster must have network access to them.

skipGuestConversion.description: Skip virt-v2v guest conversion and copy the disk as-is (raw-copy mode). Faster and avoids the privileged virt-v2v conversion pod, but the guest OS must already contain virtio drivers. Requires `vddkInitImage` to be set.

virtV2vImage.description: Override the virt-v2v conversion container image used by Forklift. Leave empty to use the operator default. Provided as an escape hatch for version mismatches in the conversion image.

xfsCompatibility.description: Use the XFS-capable virt-v2v image and omit the `--no-fstrim` flag. Works around an upstream Forklift inconsistency where the conversion entrypoint passes `--no-fstrim` to a `virt-v2v-inspector` that does not support it, which otherwise fails the migration after a successful disk conversion.

vms.description: List of virtual machines to migrate.

id.description: The managed object reference ID of the VM in vSphere (e.g. `vm-123`).

name.description: Optional target name for the VM in KubeVirt.

warm.description: Enable warm migration (incremental replication before cutover).

enableAdoption.description: Automatically label imported VMs for Cozystack adoption and dashboard visibility.

tenantNamespace.description: Tenant namespace where the imported VM is adopted as a Cozystack VMInstance. Defaults to the VMImport's own namespace. Set this when conversion runs in a privileged system namespace but the managed VM must land in a user tenant (cross-namespace adoption).

instanceType.description: KubeVirt cluster instance type (sizing preset, e.g. `u1.medium`) assigned to the adopted VMInstance. Leave empty to keep the size detected on the source VM, falling back to the adoption controller default.

instanceProfile.description: KubeVirt cluster preference (guest OS preset, e.g. `centos.stream9`) assigned to the adopted VMInstance. Leave empty to keep the preference detected on the source VM, falling back to the adoption controller default.

networkMap.description: Mapping of source networks to destination networks.

destinationName.description: Name of the destination network (required if type is `multus`).

destinationType.description: Destination type: `pod` for pod network, or `multus` for a Multus network.

sourceId.description: The managed object reference ID of the source network in vSphere.

storageMap.description: Mapping of source datastores to destination StorageClasses.

sourceId.description: The managed object reference ID of the source datastore in vSphere.

storageClass.description: Name of the destination Kubernetes StorageClass.

id.description: The managed object reference ID of the ESXi host in vSphere (e.g. `host-10`).

ipAddress.description: The host IP address the cluster should use for disk transfer (VDDK NFC, TCP 443 + 902).

secretName.description: Name of a Kubernetes Secret (in this namespace) holding the ESXi host credentials, with keys `user`, `password`, `thumbprint`, and optionally `insecureSkipVerify`.
